dataTypes.note: Sentry. Off by default; user opts in via Settings, Privacy. Anonymous installation ID only.
PostHog. Off by default. Captures screen views and feature taps; never captures health or personal content.
Reads/writes Apple HealthKit on-device only. Not collected by the developer; never sent off-device.

notes: DRAFT - generated from static SDK analysis. User must verify each line in App Store Connect, Privacy.
